title: On-chain Fundamentals: Clippers vs. Pacers
summary: Thesis The portfolio is concentrated in high conviction, on chain signals, primarily targeting price dislocations and volume anomalies across disparate asset classes. The conservative risk profile is maintained by focus...
content:
## Thesis
The portfolio is concentrated in high-conviction, on-chain signals, primarily targeting price dislocations and volume anomalies across disparate asset classes. The conservative risk profile is maintained by focusing on positions with strong trend and volume confirmations, though a significant allocation to a speculative, low-probability event introduces a notable asymmetric risk.

### Portfolio shifts
*   **Clippers vs. Pacers (16%)**: A core position supported by a full suite of positive on-chain signals (trend, probability edge, price dislocation), indicating a high-confidence, mispriced outcome in a trending market regime.
*   **Tennessee Volunteers vs. Iowa State Cyclones (16%)**: A significant allocation driven by a strong volume spike and a high trend regime score, suggesting informed market activity and momentum around this event.
*   **Dogecoin (14%)**: A satellite position primarily justified by a notable price dislocation signal, with supporting volume and opportunity quality metrics, targeting a mean reversion or momentum play in a volatile asset.
*   **Will Haiti win the 2026 FIFA World Cup? (13%)**: A high-risk, asymmetric bet defined by extreme price dislocation coupled with a strongly negative probability edge, representing a pure volatility capture or long-tail event speculation.

### Risk notes
*   The "Haiti World Cup" position (13%) carries a severe fundamental risk, as its core signal shows a strong negative probability edge (-0.7944) contradicting the price dislocation thesis.
*   Portfolio is highly concentrated, with the top four positions accounting for 59% of capital, amplifying the impact of any single thesis being incorrect.
*   Multiple positions (Dogecoin, Haiti) rely heavily on price dislocation signals without the confirming high probability edge seen in the top sports event positions.

opportunity.title: Clippers vs. Pacers
opportunity.summary: In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for March 27 at 7:00PM ET: If the Clippers win, the market will resolve to "Clippers". If the Pacers win, the market will resolve to "Pacers". ...
opportunity.description:
In the upcoming NBA game, scheduled for March 27 at 7:00PM ET:
If the Clippers win, the market will resolve to "Clippers".
If the Pacers win, the market will resolve to "Pacers".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve 50-50.
The result will be determined based on the final score including any overtime periods.
